case_title: GREGGORY D. JOHNSON VS. APPLE, INC, A CA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) KATIE WIGNEY, LEGAL SPECIALIST. FILED BY DEFENDANT APPLE, INC, A CA CORPORATION
REMARK: ORDER(SC-105A MAILED TO THE PLAINTIFF RETURNED, ATTEMPTED, UNKNOWN.
